_comment: Credential vault example. Copy to ../JARVIS_SECRETS.json. PLAINTEXT by design. JARVIS reads these via get_secret to operate accounts YOU own; it can also add/update them itself via set_secret. Never commit real secrets.

example-website.notes: A site you own a login for

personal-email.notes: Use an app password, not your main one

github.notes: A personal access token works as the password
